title: Research Area: INC | EECS at UC Berkeley
content: Research Area: INC | EECS at UC Berkeley Integrated Circuits (INC) Overview Â Topics Applications Analog-to-digital and digital-to-analog conversion, automotive electronics, biosystems, computation, consumer electronics, instrumentation, medical systems, signal processing, ubiquitous electronics, and wireless communications. Circuit Design High-speed digital and high-frequency analog circuits, microwave circuits, memories, nanoscale analog circuits, precision measurement, timing, voltages and currents, robust circuit design, and system architecture. Devices and Technology Bio/silicon interfaces, integrated sensors, mixed signal systems, mixed material systems, and microelectromechanical systems. Energy Management High-power circuits, on-chip power distribution, power/performance tradeoffs, ultra-low-power circuits, and ultra-low-voltage circuits. Research Centers Berkeley Wireless Research Center SpeciaLIzed Computing Ecosystems Faculty Primary Elad Alon Mekhail Anwar Jun-Chau Chien Rikky Muller Aditya Varma Muppala Ali Niknejad (coordinator) Borivoje Nikolic Pierluigi Nuzzo Jaijeet Roychowdhury Osama Shana'a Vladimir Stojanovic Secondary Krste AsanoviÄ Jessica Boles Bernhard Boser Zaijun Chen Paul R. Sanders Sophia Shao Alp Sipahigil Costas J. Spanos Grigory Tikhomirov Mengjie Yu Faculty Awards National Medal of Technology and Innovation: Chenming Hu, 2016. IEEE Medal of Honor: Chenming Hu, 2020. Silicon Valley Engineering Hall of Fame: Chenming Hu, 2017. Paul R. Gray, 2015. National Academy of Engineering (NAE) Member: Chenming Hu, 1996. Richard S. Muller, 1992. Paul R. Gray, 1990. Berkeley Citation: Chenming Hu, 2011. Paul R. Gray, 2006. Richard S. Muller, 1994. UC Berkeley Distinguished Teaching Award: Chenming Hu, 1997. Sloan Research Fellow: Sophia Shao, 2024. Michael Lustig, 2013. Related Courses EE 105. Microelectronic Devices and Circuits EE 140. Linear Integrated Circuits EE 142. Integrated Circuits for Communications EE 240A.
